hero.title: Learn any foreign language
hero.subtitle: With our teachers who create an individual program for each student, you will be able to speak after the first lesson.

speaking.title: Speaking
speaking.desc: Improve your English skills and confidence. Live classes and interactive online lessons. Exclusive courses and resources designed specifically for adult learners.

writing.title: Writing
writing.desc: One of the most important and extensive areas of language learning. Master grammar, syntax and stylistics to create flawless academic and business texts.

reading.title: Reading
reading.desc: Perception and analysis of textual information. Learn to quickly understand the essence of complex publications, system materials or specialized literature.

listening.title: Listening
listening.desc: Here you will find tasks to practice listening comprehension. Listening exercises will help you significantly improve your understanding of live conversational speech.

about.title: About us
about.desc: Our model offers a clear structure for solving tasks related to user experience, as well as effective methods for overcoming them. The development of individual programs begins at a strategic level, where the future learning process is formed based on the deep expectations of both students and teachers.

course1.title: Online self-study course
course1.desc: Start learning English online in live classes with qualified teachers and students from around the world.

course2.title: Live online classes
course2.desc: Interactive group classes with expert teachers. Free 7-day trial period.

course3.title: Personal tutoring
course3.desc: Individual online English lessons – first session for just $1.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.desc: Discover your current English level by taking our free online test. Subscribe to our newsletter to receive learning tips and free resources.
contact.error: Please enter a valid phone number
